headline: Star Wars Alumni Ridley and Ehrenreich Launch Romantic Comedy Offensive at Cannes
lede: Hollywood's intergalactic sweethearts are trading lightsabers for laughs in the buzzy romantic comedy 'The Last Resort'. Voltage Pictures and Vertical are positioning the film as a market darling ahead of Cannes.
body:
## Star Power Meets Market Strategy

Two former Star Wars actors are charting a new course in the romantic comedy landscape with 'The Last Resort', a project generating significant industry buzz ahead of the Cannes Film Market. Daisy Ridley and Alden Ehrenreich — both veterans of the Disney space franchise — headline the project, which has already secured strategic distribution partnerships.

### Veteran Talent Assembles

The film boasts an impressive ensemble beyond its leads, including veteran character actors Sam Neill and Tia Carrere. Voltage Pictures will drive international sales efforts, while Vertical has locked down domestic distribution rights, signaling robust confidence in the project's commercial potential.

The rom-com represents a strategic pivot for both Ridley and Ehrenreich, who are seeking to expand their ranges beyond franchise tentpoles. Industry observers note the calculated career move, positioning the actors in a genre that demands different performative skills than their previous high-profile sci-fi roles.

### Market Dynamics

With Cannes serving as the critical launching pad, 'The Last Resort' enters a competitive marketplace hungry for fresh, star-driven comedy. The film's pedigree — combining recognizable talent with a presumably contemporary romantic narrative — suggests a potential breakout indie hit.
key_facts: Sam Neill and Tia Carrere co-star
